scenarios.description: Child replacement in head triggers replace branch (origSize==childNodeSize) then correct traversal of replacement
scenarios.precondition: root with one child; visitor replaces that child in head
scenarios.expectedResult: visit original child head, then replacement head and tail, then root tail
pseudocode: public void head(Node n,int d){ order.add("H"+n.nodeName()); if(n==child) n.replaceWith(repl);}
public void tail(Node n,int d){ order.add("T"+n.nodeName());}

scenarios.description: Two sibling children trigger inner while sibling branch and correct ascend/tail order
scenarios.precondition: root with two children at same depth
scenarios.expectedResult: sequence H0, H1:c1, T1:c1, H1:c2, T1:c2, T0:root
pseudocode: public void head(Node n,int d){ seq.add("H"+d+":"+n.nodeName()); }
public void tail(Node n,int d){ seq.add("T"+d+":"+n.nodeName()); }

scenarios.description: Deep tree triggers ascend loop when nextSibling null and depth>0 (inner while B19 branch)
scenarios.precondition: root with one child and that child with one grandchild
scenarios.expectedResult: visit depth sequence H0,H1,H2 then ascend grandchildren with correct tail order T2,T1,T0
pseudocode: public void head(Node n,int d){ log.add("H"+d+":"+n.nodeName()); }
public void tail(Node n,int d){ log.add("T"+d+":"+n.nodeName()); }
